overall.description: Cinematic game footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing first-person exploration of a hazy urban environment at golden hour. The camera walks along a derelict building with scaffolding, tilts up to reveal a construction crane against the bright sky, then focuses on a wall covered in glowing cyan graffiti art featuring stylized text and eye symbols.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow alley alongside derelict building with scaffolding

events.description: construction crane arm enters view from upper right against the bright hazy sky

agents.ego_description: walking slowly along the building exterior, looking upward at the damaged concrete structure and bright sky

entered.detail: tall damaged building with broken facade and exposed concrete structure silhouetted against the sun
orange metal construction scaffolding attached to the building side
tall palm tree silhouetted against the hazy golden sky
weathered concrete pavement with patches of grass
small section of luminescent cyan graffiti symbols on the wall
large industrial crane arm extending into the hazy sky

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view walking along a narrow alley beside a derelict concrete building covered in orange scaffolding. The atmosphere is hazy and warm with golden hour backlighting. Palm trees are visible in the distance. Around 8 seconds, a large construction crane enters the frame from the upper right as the camera continues to look upward at the towering structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: graffiti-covered wall with luminescent cyberpunk artwork

events.description: camera tilts down from the sky to focus on the glowing graffiti-covered wall
full view of large cyan graffiti mural with eye symbols and stylized CYBERPUNK text revealed

agents.ego_description: stopping to examine the detailed glowing graffiti artwork covering the wall

entered.detail: extensive glowing teal graffiti covering the entire wall with abstract patterns and symbols
large stylized CYBERPUNK text in luminescent cyan with dripping effect
multiple glowing eye symbols floating around the main text

segments.scene_description: The camera tilts down from the crane and sky to focus on a massive wall covered in glowing cyan graffiti. The artwork features prominent stylized CYBERPUNK text surrounded by floating eye symbols, all rendered in luminescent teal against the dark concrete. The scaffolding is now visible on the right side as the camera examines the intricate street art up close, revealing detailed geometric patterns and Asian characters beneath the main logo.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement through a hazy urban alley that shifts from a wide architectural view to an intimate focus on glowing street art. It begins by walking beside a derelict concrete building draped in orange scaffolding, with the warm golden hour light casting a glow over distant palm trees. As the camera looks upward, a massive construction crane enters the frame and towers against the bright, hazy sky. The view then tilts down from the heights of the crane to reveal a dark concrete wall dominated by luminescent cyan graffiti. The scene finally settles on the intricate details of the artwork, where stylized text and floating eye symbols glow in teal alongside geometric patterns and Asian characters.
